customer_anxiety_profile: Low anxiety, high cooperation. Susan is warm, talkative, and already interested in solar. Primary vulnerability: health situation (waiting for medical transport, x-rays, 'get older' framing) and prior identity theft on medical records (credit frozen). Neither is a resistance signal — both are trust context the closer should acknowledge if Susan raises them.
unresolved_concerns: Credit is frozen due to identity theft — Susan will need to temporarily lift the freeze before a credit pull can be run. Randy inferred qualification from the freeze; this has not been verified.

Physical address vs. mailing address ambiguity — Susan explained her mailing address is a post office box across the street from her home. Confirm that 438 Jerales Road is the physical property address before the design team finalizes the satellite pull.

Appointment format not specified — Randy never told Susan the appointment is a phone call. Susan discussed her barn and property in detail; she may expect an in-person visit. Closer should confirm the phone format at the top of the call.
sensitive_topics_raised: Health: Susan is undergoing medical imaging (x-rays), waiting for medical transport at time of call. Framed lightly but present.
Identity theft: Medical records compromised; credit frozen as protective measure.
Deceased mother on title: Susan confirmed her mother is on the title but is deceased. Closer should be aware this may require documentation or title clarification depending on state law.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment confirmed for tomorrow (day after call) at 2PM.
One hour blocked so Susan does not feel rushed.
Specialist will go over pricing, warranties, and projected savings.
Design will be sent to the design team based on the kWh readback Susan provided.
closer_should_know: Susan's stated install preference is the barn, not the house — she described it as an active equipment shop and said she wants the panels there. The design team may have built a house-roof design. If the closer opens with a house design, the appointment starts in misalignment. Confirm the barn preference at the top of the call and verify the design reflects it before presenting.
